description: Estimate AWS service costs and compare pricing scenarios for planning decisions.
name: io.qent.broxy/aws-pricing

environmentVariables.description: AWS access key ID with access to the AWS Pricing API
environmentVariables.name: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID

environmentVariables.description: AWS session token for temporary credentials
environmentVariables.name: AWS_SESSION_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: AWS region for the Pricing API endpoint (us-east-1, eu-central-1, ap-southeast-1)
environmentVariables.name: AWS_REGION

environmentVariables.description: Logging level (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL)
environmentVariables.name: FASTMCP_LOG_LEVEL

title: AWS Pricing
